A03 - Injection : 1
A05 - Security Misconfiguration : 2

🔴 Threat #1
Name       : Missing Security Header: CONTENT-SECURITY-POLICY
OWASP      : A05 - Security Misconfiguration
Risk       : Browser protections disabled
Resolution : Configure content-security-policy
Source     : Dynamic

🔴 Threat #2
Name       : Missing Security Header: X-CONTENT-TYPE-OPTIONS
OWASP      : A05 - Security Misconfiguration
Risk       : Browser protections disabled
Resolution : Configure x-content-type-options
Source     : Dynamic

🟢 Threat #3
Name       : Inline JavaScript Detected
OWASP      : A03 - Injection
Risk       : Increased XSS risk
Resolution : Move scripts to external files
Source     : Static
